label: 宇宙地形细节变化
description: 将多张单值地形网格合并为一张，并在地形边界处施加细节噪声扰动，使边界过渡更自然
description-en: Merges multiple single-value terrain grids into one, then applies boundary noise to create natural terrain transitions.
icon: 地形网格局部放大图，不同材质纹理斑块交错分布，棕绿色系，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: terrainGridList
inputs.label: 地形网格列表
inputs.description: 输入地形网格列表（接 cosmos_biome_mapper.terrainGridList），多张单值地形网格
inputs.description-en: Input terrain grid list (from cosmos_biome_mapper.terrainGridList), multiple single-value terrain grids.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0使用当前时间戳

inputs.name: variationStrength
inputs.label: 变化强度
inputs.description: 边界扰动概率倍率，1.0为正常（最大30%边界格被替换），0关闭扰动
inputs.description-en: Boundary perturbation multiplier; 1.0 = normal (up to 30% boundary cells replaced), 0 = disabled.

inputs.name: inputNameList
inputs.label: 输入名称清单
inputs.description: 地形名称清单（接 cosmos_biome_mapper.nameList），透传并按实际出现的 id 过滤后输出
inputs.description-en: Terrain name list (from cosmos_biome_mapper.nameList); passed through and filtered by IDs present in the output grid.

outputs.name: variedGridList
outputs.label: 细化地形网格列表
outputs.description: 多张单值网格，每张对应一种地形，填充值为该地形的 id，其余为 0；与 nameList 顺序一一对应
outputs.description-en: Multiple single-value grids, one per terrain type; each grid has the terrain id at matching cells and 0 elsewhere; corresponds 1:1 with nameList.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 地形名称清单
outputs.description: 合并网格中实际出现的地形条目，透传自 inputNameList 并按实际 id 过滤
outputs.description-en: Terrain name entries actually present in the merged grid; filtered from inputNameList by used IDs.
